programs.title: Live: NBA Basketball
programs.desc: The Thunder host the Lakers for a pivotal Game 1 of the Western Conference second-round series. Top-seeded Oklahoma City enters after a first-round sweep, while Los Angeles won its series in six games. The Thunder swept the season series 4-0.
